title: April 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 6''' is the 96th day of the year (97th in leap years). There are 269 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s|1926]] – [[Gil Kane]] is born.
*[[1930s|1937]] – [[Billy Dee Williams]] is born.
*[[1940s|1947]] – [[John Ratzenberger]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Cindy Robinson]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Zach Braff]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[The Millennium Falcon Deal]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 94|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 94]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|novel]] and [[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] released.
*[[2004]] – "[[Chapter 18 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Clone Wars Chapter 18]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2004 – ''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' teaser trailer releases on the ''Star Wars'' YouTube channel.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (script)|''Doctor Aphra'']] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 2: Operation Starlight]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Tatooine (reference book)|''Tatooine'']] published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]].
*2021 – ''[[Skywalker: A Family at War]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 22|''Bounty Hunters'' 22]] published.
*2022 – [[Christopher Muncke]] dies.
*[[2023]] – [[Norman Reynolds]] dies.
*[[2025]] – "[[The Firehawk Feud / The Chop Shop Calamity]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord]]'' to premiere on [[Disney+]].
